S03.meta: // SLIDE 03 — WHAT THIS CHAPTER LETS YOU DO

data.title: WHAT THIS CHAPTER LETS YOU DO.
blocks: · Name the categories of tasks that must not be delegated to personal Cowork.
· Apply a concrete decision rule before starting a Cowork task.
· Distinguish "Cowork can do this" from "Cowork should do this."
Redesign a problematic task into a safer form or escalate it to the right channel.
· Recognize when "human review at the end" is not enough protection.
data.section: WHAT THIS CHAPTER LETS YOU DO

Core Concept: The Boundary of Supervised — Anthropic's guidance for Cowork is direct: sensitive data, sensitive apps, irreversible actions, and consequential judgm

data.title: THE NONDELEGATION CATEGORIES.
blocks: Redesign if possible:
Redesign if possible:
Redesign if possible:
Redesign if possible:
Redesign for all irreversible actions:

data.title: THE DECISION RULE.
blocks: · Identifiable health information about a person
· Student records or educational privacy-protected data
· Personnel evaluation, discipline, or promotion
· Legal advice, medical advice, or financial judgment
· Any action that cannot be undone without backup and human approval

data.title: THREE REDESIGN MOVES.
blocks: Move 1: Reduce the data.
Move 2: Reduce the action.
Move 3: Increase governance.

data.title: THE NONDELEGATION TABLE.
blocks: Protected health data — Do not use personal Cowork
Student records — Do not use personal Cowork
Personnel decisions — Human-only judgment
Legal / financial / medical advice — Human professional

S09.meta: // SLIDE 09 — WHY "HUMAN REVIEW AT THE END"

data.title: WHY "HUMAN REVIEW AT THE END" IS NOT ENOUGH.
blocks: The most common rationalization for proceeding with a problematic task is: "I will check the output before I do anything
Why "Human Review at the End" Is Not Eno — This reasoning fails for at least three reasons.

data.title: COMMON MISTAKES
blocks: "If Cowork can do it, it is okay."
"The task is safe if the output stays on my computer."
"Redaction is always enough."
"Legal or medical disclaimers in the prompt make the output acceptable."
"Sensitive data only means passwords."
